zh.lifeSummary: 當Payne de Chaworth於大約1185年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德時，他的父親Patrick De Chaworth32歲，母親Weruga De Kempsford30歲。他於大約1214年與Odeline de Clinchamp在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德結婚。他去世於1237年5月11日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾格盧斯特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Payne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Payne de Chaworth was born about 1185, in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Patrick De Chaworth, was 32 and his mother, Weruga De Kempsford, was 30. He married Odeline de Clinchamp about 1214, in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 11 May 1237, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Payne de Chaworth est né environ 1185, à Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Patrick De Chaworth, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Weruga De Kempsford, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Odeline de Clinchamp environ 1214, à Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 11 mai 1237, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Payne de Chaworth um 1185 in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick De Chaworth 32 und seine Mutter Weruga De Kempsford 30. Er hat um 1214 in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Odeline de Clinchamp geheiratet. Er starb am 11. Mai 1237 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Odeline de Clinchamp circa 1214, nel Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 11 maggio 1237, nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Payne de Chaworthが約1185年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケンプスフォードで生まれた時，父Patrick De Chaworthは32歳，母Weruga De Kempsfordは30歳であった。約1214年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケンプスフォードでOdeline de Clinchampと結婚した。彼は1237年5月11日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアグロウセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Payne de Chaworth(이)가 대략 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 케프스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick De Chaworth(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Weruga De Kempsford(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 케프스퍼드에서 Odeline de Clinchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1237년 5월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Payne de Chaworth nasceu aproximadamente 1185, em Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Patrick De Chaworth, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Weruga De Kempsford, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Odeline de Clinchamp aproximadamente 1214, em Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 11 de maio de 1237, em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Payne de Chaworth родился около 1185 г. в местности кемпсфорд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Patrick De Chaworth было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Weruga De Kempsford, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Odeline de Clinchamp около 1214 г. в местности кемпсфорд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 11 мая 1237 г. в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
